title: alangium rotundifolium
intro: Alangium rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaved alangium or alangium vine, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Alangium rotundifolium include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and promote antioxidant activity. In traditional medicine, Alangium rotundifolium is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
